=====On hand=====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Cheren
|pkmn=Emboar
|stage2=Pignite
|stage1=Tepig

|type2=Fighting
|img=Cheren Tepig PBW.png
|img_size=150px
|cap=Cheren's Tepig
|img2=Cheren Emboar PBW.png
|img2_size=150px
|epnum=PBW1
|epname=Advance Toward the Path of the Strongest!
|desc=Cheren's {{p|Tepig}} is well trained and has a type advantage over [[Monta's Snivy]]. It was first used in a [[Double Battle]] with Snivy against the Biker King's {{p|Braviary}}. After Snivy tries a {{m|Vine Whip}} which hardly does any damage, he goes in for a fire attack which hardly does any damage too. Tepig is then sent flying with {{m|Peck}}. It goes in with a Fire Pledge with {{m|Grass Pledge}} creating the combination needed to defeat Braviary.

It battles Monta in ''[[PBW2|The Key to Triple Battles]]'' with {{p|Pansage}} and {{p|Basculin}} against Monta's {{p|Snivy}}, {{p|Panpour}} and {{p|Roggenrola}}. It starts off with an Ember on Snivy, before taking a hit for Basculin by switching places with it, not hurting it much. But seconds later, Panpour uses {{m|Surf}} fainting it.

Tepig reappeared as an {{p|Emboar}} where it fought with Monta's {{p|Reshiram}}, {{p|Victini}} and {{p|Zekrom}} in the Single and Triple Battle.

Emboar's known moves are {{m|Fire Pledge}}, {{m|Ember}}, {{m|Flare Blitz}}, {{m|Rock Slide}}, and {{m|Blast Burn}}.}}

|trainer=Cheren

|type1=Grass
|img=Cheren Pansage PBW.png
|epnum=PBW2
|epname=The Key to Triple Battles
|desc=Cheren's {{p|Pansage}} was first seen in a battle against [[Monta]]'s {{p|Snivy}}, {{p|Panpour}} and {{p|Roggenrola}} with {{p|Tepig}} and {{p|Basculin}}. It gets hurt a tiny bit by Panpour's {{m|Surf}}, but along with Basculin is defeated by a powerful {{m|Rock Slide}} by Roggenrola.

None of Pansage's moves are known.}}

|trainer=Cheren
|pkmn=Basculin

|img=Cheren Basculin PBW.png
|epnum=PBW2
|epname=The Key to Triple Battles
|desc=Cheren's Red-Striped {{p|Basculin}} was first seen in a battle against [[Monta]]'s {{p|Snivy}}, {{p|Panpour}}, and {{p|Roggenrola}} with {{p|Tepig}} and {{p|Pansage}}. It is about to get hit by Snivy's {{m|Vine Whip}} but switches places with Tepig. It then gets hit by Panpour's {{m|Surf}} which does not do much damage. But along with Pansage is defeated by a powerful {{m|Rock Slide}} from Roggenrola, fainting it.

None of Basculin's moves are known.}}
